pages.text: Cuisine has 4 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:cuisine_core_t1, kubejs:cuisine_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:cuisine_core_t1$() gates: farmersdelight:cooking_pot, farmersdelight:stove
$(li)$(item)kubejs:cuisine_core_t2$() gates: cookingforblockheads:cooking_table
$(li)$(item)kubejs:cuisine_core_t3$() gates: sliceanddice:slicer, cookingforblockheads:white_fridge, cookingforblockheads:white_oven
$(li)$(item)kubejs:cuisine_core_t4$() gates: cookingforblockheads:preservation_chamber, cookingforblockheads:spice_rack
